instruction: Set GNOME favorites to exactly three apps in this order: thunderbird.desktop, google-chrome.desktop, org.gnome.Terminal.desktop. Ensure vim.desktop is removed. Then write the same ordered list (one item per line) to ~/Desktop/favorites_audit.txt.

parameters.command: export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS='unix:path=/run/user/1000/bus'; gsettings set org.gnome.shell favorite-apps "['thunderbird.desktop','vim.desktop','google-chrome.desktop']"; rm -f ~/Desktop/favorites_audit.txt

result.command:
val=$(export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS='unix:path=/run/user/1000/bus'; gsettings get org.gnome.shell favorite-apps); pyok=$(python - <<'PY'
import ast
s="""$val"""
try:
    apps=ast.literal_eval(s.strip())
except Exception:
    print('FAIL'); raise SystemExit
exp=['thunderbird.desktop','google-chrome.desktop','org.gnome.Terminal.desktop']
print('PASS' if apps==exp else 'FAIL')
PY
); ok=1; [ "$pyok" = "PASS" ] || ok=0; expected=$(cat <<'EOF'
thunderbird.desktop
google-chrome.desktop
org.gnome.Terminal.desktop
EOF
); actual=$(cat ~/Desktop/favorites_audit.txt 2>/dev/null); [ "$actual" = "$expected" ] || ok=0; if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then echo PASS; else echo FAIL; fi
